scripts.dev: npm run check-env && concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.check-env: node -e "if (!require('fs').existsSync('.env')) { console.error('ERROR: .env file missing. Copy .env.example to .env and add your API keys.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.setup: pip install -r requirements.txt && npm install && npm install --prefix frontend-next
